title: polystichum abbreviatum
intro: Polystichum abbreviatum, also known as the Short-Beaked Maidenhair Fern, is a species of fern that belongs to the family Dryopteridaceae. It is traditionally used in herbal medicine, valued for its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which can help to soothe skin irritations and wounds. The health benefits of Polystichum abbreviatum include reducing inflammation, promoting wound healing, and supporting immune function. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used in infusions or decoctions to make teas or tinctures that can be applied topically or taken internally.
